title.en: Ensure ftp client is not installed

prose.en: Ensure ftp client is not installed

description.en: `tnftp` an enhanced FTP client, is the user interface to the Internet standard File Transfer Protocol. The program allows a user to transfer files to and from a remote network site.

rationale.en: Unless there is a need to run the system using Internet standard File Transfer Protocol (for example, to allow anonymous downloads), it is recommended that the package be removed to reduce the potential attack surface.

audit.en:
Run the following commands to uninstall `tnftp` & `ftp`:

```
# apt purge ftp
# apt purge tnftp
```

remediation.en:
Run the following commands to uninstall `tnftp` & `ftp`:

```
# apt purge ftp
# apt purge tnftp
```
